events.rationale: The table is set, and everyone is holding their cards close. With no offers on the board, I can't spin a deal yet, so I must prime the pump. As the Grey tribe of the Mountains, I sit on a vein of Ore. Gathering at home gives me that sweet double yield—2 Ore instead of 1. This isn't just hoarding; it's stocking the inventory. I'll hold onto this Ore and see who comes knocking for a trade in the next phase. A strong opening move to establish my resource base.

Immediate points, engine upgrade.

No offers on the table, so I'll focus on securing my supply line before opening negotiations next turn.
